spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 3 of 3 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Five scenario buttons now drive documented SecurityInfo states and update fields, issues, and pinning verdict live.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Chrome DevTools verified secure, raw DER, missing extraInfoSpec, broken TLS, and weak-state branches; weak/broken/missing cases fail pinning.

references.rationale: Cites chromestatus.com/feature/5076692209106944 and the Chrome webRequest onHeadersReceived reference.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex, button overrides keep bg+color paired.

summary: Chrome DevTools verified the corrected SecurityInfo inspector, required references, and all failure branches. No open questions remain for this concept.
